title: Behavior Find Mount
description: Allows the mob to look around for another mob to ride atop it.

avoid_water.description: Whether the entity avoids water while pathing to a mount.

mount_distance.description: Distance in blocks at which the entity is considered to have reached the mount.

start_delay.description: Time in ticks before the entity starts looking for a mount.

target_needed.description: Whether the entity needs a specific target.
